creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks.  Please take a look at the following for starters:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributing/ports-contributing.html
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/ports.html
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html (expert reading)
